text:
A few programs don't work under current.

	kaudioserver isn't built using libcompat
	kdehelp coredumps all the time
	kscd could perhaps better be initialized to /dev/cdrom, not to
	   /dev/matcd0c
	kdenetwork doesn't compile for me
	kirc doesn't build for me

Fix: 

sorry, haven't had too much time to look into that :-(
